markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project progress and plan for the integration hub's V2.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**V2 Strategy:** The V2 strategy will enhance articles with rich media (screenshots) and integrate Reddit/forum questions into FAQs to provide canonical answers to user pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Partnership Leverage:** The hub is a powerful tool for the tech partnerships team, driving app installs (e.g., Upload Care saw a spike) and providing data to advocate for partner app improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Category Overhaul:** A new category structure will be implemented to fix partner complaints about inconsistent categories (e.g., some with 1 app, others with 40), improving user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Process Gaps:** Two key processes are missing: a formal way for partners to request article changes and a triage system for new integration hub requests.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

## Topics

### V2 Strategy for Article Enhancement

  - [With over 400 articles published, the team is planning a V2 strategy to improve content quality and utility.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Primary Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [**Rich Media:** Add screenshots and other media to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**FAQ Expansion:** Integrate common questions from Reddit and forums into FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Provide canonical answers to user pain points, replacing scattered forum threads.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
          - [**Example:** For "Webflow WooCommerce," address the product limit question directly.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
              - [**Answer:** The Advanced plan supports high volume, but the process is tedious.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
              - [**Significance:** This honest answer builds trust and clarifies platform capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Hub Performance & Partnership Leverage

  - [The integration hub is a key asset for the tech partnerships team, who are now requesting changes and additions.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Articles are ranking well in search.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [Amplitude data shows a clear spike in installs for apps featured in the hub (e.g., Upload Care).](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Conclusion:** The hub supplements the marketplace by driving discovery, not cannibalizing it.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Strategic Value:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Partner Advocacy:** Provides data (e.g., page visits) to advocate for partner app improvements in QBRs.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**New App Justification:** Proves user demand for integrations that don't yet have an app.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [**Growth Potential:** An estimated 180–200 unique apps could benefit from dedicated guides.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Category Structure Overhaul

  - [The current category structure is inconsistent, with some categories having only 1 app and others having 40.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Impact:** This inconsistency causes friction for the tech partnerships team, who manage partner relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a new, more logical category structure.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Implementation:** GrowthX will use the Webflow API to update categories in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [**SEO:** A 301 redirect strategy is needed for old category pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize a simpler structure over the complex, multi-nested proposal to ensure feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Deliver design suggestions for the developer hub.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Implement the new category structure via the Webflow API after approval.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Colin:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [Share the category recategorization proposal with the tech partnerships team for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [Define a process for partners to request changes to their integration hub articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
      - [Begin planning for the V2 strategy, focusing on rich media and FAQ expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/8DvWSTqi7zo8o4awDtjyiy4SHTtb8poU?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
